2026-03-24 程式 學習

數位邏輯設計筆記

Mar 24, 2026

DSD 筆記

3/17上課重點

  • 要把要跑的module set as top
  • temp=8'b0or8'b000000or0是一樣的

2/1MUX

module MUX(out,a,b,sel);
    output out;
    input a,b,sel;
    
    always @(*) begin
        if(sel)
            out = b;
        else
            out = a;
    end
    //或是 assign out = sel ? b : a ;
endmodule

full adder

module FA(s,cout,a,b,cin);
    output s,cout;
    input a,b,cin;
    
    wire temp = 1'b0;// 直接寫0也可以
    assign {cout,s} = {temp,a} + {temp,b} + {temp,c};
endmodule

RCA

module RCA(s,c4,a,b,c0);
    output c4;
    output [3:0] s;
    input [3:0] a,b;
    input c0;
    
    wire c1,c2,c3;
    FA fa0(s[0],c1,a[0],b[0],c0);
    FA fa1(s[1],c2,a[1],b[1],c1);
    FA fa2(s[2],c3,a[2],b[2],c2);
    FA fa3(s[3],c4,a[3],b[3],c3);
endmodule

ADD&SUB


記得有二補數

module RCA(s,c4,a,b,m);
    output c4;
    output [3:0] s;
    input m; //add : 0;sub : 1
    input [3:0] a,b;
    
    wire [3:0] k = b ^ {4{m}};
    
    wire c1,c2,c3;
    FA fa0(s[0],c1,a[0],k[0],m); 
    //此時c0用m取代因為僅有在減法時需要先+1，所以放在第0位的初始進位
    FA fa1(s[1],c2,a[1],k[1],c1);
    FA fa2(s[2],c3,a[2],k[2],c2);
    FA fa3(s[3],c4,a[3],k[3],c3);
endmodule

equality comparator

module COM(e,a,b);
    output e;
    input [3:0] a,b;
    
    wire [3:0] c;
    assign c = a ~^ b;
    assign e=&c;
endmodule

decoder

module dec(d,e,a,b);
    output reg [3:0] d;
    input a,b,e;
    wire [1:0] temp ={a,b}
    always @(*)begin
        if(e)
            d=4'b1111;
        else begin
            if(temp == 2'b00)
                d=4'b1110;
            else if(temp == 2'b01)
                d=4'b1101;
            else if(temp == 2'b10)
                d=4'b1011;
            else
                d=4'b0111;
        end
    end
    /*用case的寫法
    always @(*) begin
        if (e)
            d = 4'b1111;
        else begin
            case ({a,b})
                2'b00: d = 4'b1110;
                2'b01: d = 4'b1101;
                2'b10: d = 4'b1011;
                2'b11: d = 4'b0111;
                default: d = 4'bxxxx;
                //default建議寫，比較好除錯
            endcase
        end
    end
    */
endmodule

BCD adder

module bcd_add(s,cout,a,b,cin);
    output reg [3:0] s;
    output reg cout;
    input [3:0] a,b;
    input cin;
    
    reg [4:0] temp;
    
    always @(*)begin
        temp = a + b + cin;
        if(temp > 9)
            temp = temp + 4'd6;
        s = temp[3:0];
        cout = temp[4];
    end
endmodule

3/24 上課重點

Clock

always @(posedge clk)

always @(negedge clk)

FF

簡單定義

module FF_PN(clk,x1,y1)
    input clk,x1;
    output reg y1;
    always @(posedge clk)
        y1 <= x1; //non-blocking assigment(會在同時間更新、不會延遲)
endmodule

有reset

Synchronous reset

module FF_PN(clk,reset,q,d)
    input reset,clk,d;
    output reg q;
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if(!reset)
            q <= 0;
        else
            q <= d;
    end
endmodule

Asynchronous reset

module FF_PN(clk,reset,q,d)
    input reset,clk,d;
    output reg q;
    always @(posedge clk or negedge reset ) begin
        if(!reset)
            q <= 0;
        else
            q <= d;
    end
endmodule

register
